name: io.github.Akhilucky/ai-firewall-mcp
title: AI Firewall MCP
description: Multi-agent LLM security layer detecting prompt injection and jailbreaks.

tools.name: analyze_prompt
tools.description: Analyze a prompt for injection, jailbreaks, exfiltration, and leakage threats

tools.name: get_threat_breakdown
tools.description: Return detailed per-signal scoring breakdown for the last analysis

tools.name: sanitize_prompt
tools.description: Clean suspicious prompts while preserving legitimate content

tools.name: get_firewall_status
tools.description: Health check with vector DB stats and model readiness

tools.name: benchmark_firewall
tools.description: Run adversarial test suite and return detection statistics
